ocr.text: In FY2023, Johnson & Johnson's Oncology portfolio demonstrated significant performance in the Asia-Pacific region, with a
focus on key products and their respective market dynamics.
The primary product, Zytiga, recorded an impressive revenue of $1.2M, reflecting a year-over-year change of 10.5%, which
corresponds to a substantial market share of 35.2%. This growth can be largely attributed to robust demand and expanded
indications within the oncology landscape. Additionally, Imfinzi, another critical player in the oncology portfolio, showed
promise as a key oncology drug, contributing to the overall growth strategy with a growth driver index of 8.3, further enhancing
the company's position in the competitive oncology market. The combination of these products and their growth drivers
indicates a strategic focus on maximizing market potential and addressing patient needs across the Asia-Pacific region, resulting
in a solid performance for the fiscal year.
